---
title: "Climatology and Oceanography"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include climatology-and-oceanography/00-syllabus.md >}}


{{< include climatology-and-oceanography/01-weather-system.md >}}

{{< include climatology-and-oceanography/02-atmospheric-circulation.md >}}

{{< include climatology-and-oceanography/03-ocean-bottom-salinity.md >}}

{{< include climatology-and-oceanography/04-practical.md >}}
